inputs.label: Annual Shipping Volume (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units shipped per year across all modes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units shipped per year across all modes.

inputs.label: Average Shipment Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Average weight per shipment, used to compute freight cost and risk exposure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average weight per shipment, used to compute freight cost and risk exposure.

inputs.label: Average Distance per Shipment (km)
inputs.businessContext: Average haul distance for each shipment, influences fuel cost and transit risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average haul distance for each shipment, influences fuel cost and transit risk.

inputs.label: Transport Mode
inputs.businessContext: Primary mode of transport: truck, rail, ocean, air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Primary mode of transport: truck, rail, ocean, air.

inputs.label: Fuel Price (USD per liter)
inputs.businessContext: Current diesel or bunker fuel price, used for variable cost estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current diesel or bunker fuel price, used for variable cost estimation.

inputs.label: Labor Rate (USD per hour)
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage for drivers/operators, used in labor cost calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average hourly wage for drivers/operators, used in labor cost calculation.

inputs.label: Transit Time (days)
inputs.businessContext: Expected door-to-door transit time, affects inventory carrying cost and risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected door-to-door transit time, affects inventory carrying cost and risk.

inputs.label: Historical Damage Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of shipments damaged in transit, based on historical data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of shipments damaged in transit, based on historical data.

inputs.label: Insurance Rate (per $1000 value)
inputs.businessContext: Premium per $1000 of declared cargo value, used for insurance cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Premium per $1000 of declared cargo value, used for insurance cost.

inputs.label: Cargo Value per Unit (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average value of each shipped unit, used for risk exposure and insurance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average value of each shipped unit, used for risk exposure and insurance.

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost (% of value per year)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of cargo value, includes warehousing, capital cost.

label_i18n.en: Inventory Holding Cost (% of value per year)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost to hold inventory as a percentage of cargo value, includes warehousing, capital cost.

inputs.label: Carbon Tax (USD per ton CO2)
inputs.businessContext: Regulatory cost per metric ton of CO2 emitted, used for environmental cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Regulatory cost per metric ton of CO2 emitted, used for environmental cost.

inputs.label: Apply Lean Metrics (takt time, waste)
inputs.businessContext: If enabled, includes lean waste factors (overprocessing, waiting) in cost and risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: If enabled, includes lean waste factors (overprocessing, waiting) in cost and risk.

rules.message: Total annual tonnage exceeds 10,000 metric tons. Consider rail or ocean for cost efficiency.
Air freight for distances under 500 km is rarely economical. Consider truck.
High damage rate with low insurance rate indicates underinsurance. Increase coverage.
Long transit combined with high holding cost suggests high pipeline inventory cost. Evaluate mode shift.

thresholds.message: Total annual cost exceeds $500,000. Consider cost reduction strategies.
Risk-adjusted confidence below 60%. Review data quality and assumptions.
Carbon cost exceeds $10,000. Explore low-carbon alternatives.

formulas.label: Freight Cost
formulas.description: Base freight cost based on mode, weight, distance, and fuel.

subFormulas.mode_base_rate: CASE mode WHEN 'truck' THEN 0.15 * avg_shipment_weight * distance_km / 1000 WHEN 'rail' THEN 0.08 * avg_shipment_weight * distance_km / 1000 WHEN 'ocean' THEN 0.04 * avg_shipment_weight * distance_km / 1000 WHEN 'air' THEN 0.60 * avg_shipment_weight * distance_km / 1000 END

formulas.label: Labor Cost
formulas.description: Driver/operator labor cost based on transit time and handling.

formulas.label: Damage & Insurance Cost
formulas.description: Expected cost from damage plus insurance premium.

formulas.label: Carbon Cost
formulas.description: Environmental cost based on CO2 emissions and carbon tax.

subFormulas.emission_factor: CASE mode WHEN 'truck' THEN 0.15 WHEN 'rail' THEN 0.03 WHEN 'ocean' THEN 0.01 WHEN 'air' THEN 0.60 END

formulas.label: Lean Waste Cost (optional)
formulas.description: Cost of non-value-added activities if lean metrics enabled.
formulas.expression: CASE WHEN use_lean_metrics = true THEN (freight_cost + labor_cost) * 0.12 ELSE 0 END

formulas.label: Total Annual Cost (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Sum of all cost components, adjusted for risk confidence.
formulas.expression: (freight_cost + labor_cost + inventory_carrying_cost + damage_and_insurance_cost + carbon_cost + lean_waste_cost) * (1 + (1 - dataConfidenceAdjusted))

primary.label: Total Annual Cost (USD)
primary.description: Primary result: total annual cost of transport mode including risk adjustment.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excessive transit time variability
hiddenLossDrivers.description: High standard deviation in transit time increases safety stock and holding cost.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Underestimated damage rate
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Historical damage rate may not reflect current conditions; consider real-time tracking.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Fuel price volatility
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Fuel surcharge formula may lag market changes, causing cost exposure.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Mode mismatch with distance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Using air for short distances or truck for very long distances increases cost and emissions.

suggestedActions.label: Consolidate shipments
suggestedActions.description: Increase shipment size to reduce per-unit freight cost (economies of scale).

suggestedActions.label: Shift to intermodal
suggestedActions.description: For distances >800 km, consider rail-truck intermodal to lower cost and emissions.

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate insurance rates
suggestedActions.description: If damage rate is low, negotiate lower insurance premium per $1000.

suggestedActions.label: Implement real-time tracking
suggestedActions.description: Reduce transit time variability and improve data confidence.

suggestedActions.label: Adopt lean logistics
suggestedActions.description: Eliminate waiting and overprocessing to reduce waste cost by up to 12%.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score (0-1)
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Adjusted confidence based on input completeness and historical accuracy. Used to scale total cost for risk.
